title: Module 1
content:
Introduction
Current level of production, consumption and export of meat products. Meat
composition from different sources; muscle structure and compositions;
Effect of feed, breed and management on production and quality, post-
mortem muscle chemistry; meat colour and flavours; meat microbiology
and safety

title: Module 2
Module 3
content:
Handling and Transportation
Care in Handling and transportation of fish at sea; Handling and
transportation on land; Ship board refrigeration equipment’s; Cold chain.
design of refrigerated and insulated trucks;
Cured and smoked fish
Salt curing of fish; Storage of salted fish; Quality of finished products;
Production of cold smoke fish; Hot smoked fish and light salted and light
smoked fish; smoked fish using curing liquid

title: Module 4
content:
Poultry processing
Introduction, Reception of birds, antemortem examination of poultry, steps
involved in poultry processing, post mortem examination, chilling, grading,
cutting, packaging. Meat yield
